name: Theorealize
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無垢なる予幻視</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>テオリアライズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Medius the Pure" from your Deck to the GY; look at the top card of your opponent's Deck, and place it on the top or bottom of the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster you control and declare 1 Monster Type and 1 Attribute; that monster becomes that Type and Attribute, until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use each effect of "Theorealize" once per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Medius the Pure" from your Deck to the GY; look at the top card of your opponent's Deck, and place it on the top or bottom of the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster you control and declare 1 Monster Type and 1 Attribute; that monster becomes that Type and Attribute, until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use each effect of "Theorealize" once per turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Looks at cards from the top of the opponent's Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
